message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber

participant "Test" as Test
participant "GrpcClient" as GrpcClient
participant "Front" as Front
participant "Edge" as Edge
participant "HttpToGrpcMock" as HttpToGrpcMock

Test -> Front : POST /send/post
Test --> GrpcClient : instruct to wait for /external/call
Front -> Edge : Internal communication
Edge -> HttpToGrpcMock : http
note right of HttpToGrpcMock: Thinks is calling actual\nexternal service
HttpToGrpcMock -> GrpcClient : grpc
note right of HttpToGrpcMock: Info about received request\nis forwarded to tests
GrpcClient -> Test : Assert request
activate Test
deactivate Test
Test -> GrpcClient : Mocked response
GrpcClient -> HttpToGrpcMock : 
HttpToGrpcMock -->> Edge : http
Edge -->> Front : 
note bottom of Front: Responding back front may not be necessary in most cases.\nMaybe it would be database update or something like that
Front -->> Test : Resolve /send/post promise
Test -> Test : Assert response
activate Test
deactivate Test

@enduml
```
